title: 24:42 â November 28, 2024
body_text:
24:42 â November 28, 2024
Update to the FX Notes Plus Part
The FX Notes Plus Part was updated to include more detail about exchange rate updates. Exchange rates are updated on the application once a day at 4:15 am PT / 7:15 am ET. If there is an increase in an exchange rate of 1% or more during the day, the revised rate will be updated on the application.
Instructions for creating or modifying FX Notes Plus Users were also updated. Security Officers must ensure the CU name field uses the same financial institution name that was recorded in the Financial Institution Name for User Management field of the previously submitted FX Notes Plus Branch Locations, Form 5898.
Additionally, a new section was added to provide instructions on how to complete and submit FX Notes Plus Branch Locations, Form 5898.
Currency Volume
FX Notes Plus Part
Section 1.3, FX Notes Plus Availability and Currency Exchange Rates
Added specific timing for daily exchange rate updates.
Chapter 5, Managing FX Notes Plus Branch Locations
Added a new chapter.
Section 6.2 Creating FX Notes Plus Users
Updated instructions to address floating privileges. Also added instructions for pulling information from the previously submitted FX Notes Plus Branch Locations, Form 5898.
